children.name: By entering your card details, you authorize Conikal LLC to charge your card for future payments in line with their terms and conditions.

children.name: You will receive an email notification whenever your monthly balance reaches or exceeds the specified threshold amount. This helps you stay informed and take action before reaching your limit.
